pi_items.verified_value: 25 points for any first phrase found
pi_items.source: verifier.py assigns 25 points for 1 phrase, 50 points for 2 or more phrases (out of 3)

pi_items.verified_value: 25 points for any second phrase found
pi_items.source: verifier.py assigns 25 points for 1 phrase, 50 points for 2 or more phrases (out of 3)

privileged_info_summary: The task verifies the creation of a 'Normal Physical Exam' progress note template by checking for the title and specific phrases in the FreeMED database dump. The checked phrases are 'in no acute distress', 'No murmurs, rubs, or gallops', and 'clear to auscultation bilaterally'. The verifier awards 25 points for the title, up to 50 points total for finding at least two of the three phrases (25 points for 1, 50 points for 2 or more), and 25 points for VLM verification of the system template module usage.
